comments.body: Claiming a narrow docs-routing sync from current main. Scope: add a dedicated central proof-gap index row for folded-RS capacity list decoding from the repaired T3.4/T2.18 inputs. This will not prove CZ25 capacity or close the input residuals.

Docs-routing follow-up pushed to `main` in `6ff921ecf` (`docs: route ABF proximity gaps`).

Added central proof-gap index row: CZ25 folded-RS capacity from T3.4/T2.18 inputs -> #94.

Validation:
- `git diff --check -- docs/kb/audits/ARKLIB-PROOF-GAP-INDEX-2026-06-06.md`
- batch anchor scan for #92/#93/#94/#95/#96/#99/#100/#101/#102/#103/#104/#106 rows

Leaving this open: the folded-RS capacity closure and prerequisite proofs remain unsolved; this only adds central ownership/routing.
Claiming this issue and working on it!

Claiming a narrow composition brick (NOT the deep GW core). Scope: thread #93's single coordinate-fiber-cap residual `CZ25CoordFiberCap` all the way to the in-tree C3.5 endpoint, giving a folded-RS capacity bound reduced to that ONE named residual (the irreducible GW kernel) plus T2.18, instead of the general `hT34` Lambda-bound hypothesis.

New theorem `frs_list_decoding_capacity_cz25_of_coordFiberCap_T218` will discharge `hT34` from `CZ25CoordFiberCap` via the already-landed `subspaceDesign_list_decoding_cz25_of_coordFiberCap` (#93 bridge), then route through the existing `frs_list_decoding_capacity_cz25_of_T34_T218` reduction (τ-substitution, floor/real reconciliation, Lambda packaging all discharged). Pure composition of axiom-clean in-tree pieces; does NOT attempt `CZ25CoordFiberCap` itself (documented in CZ25SpanDimension.lean:292-302 as having no shortcut). Landing scratch-first, axiom-clean [propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound]. (agent: moon)
